title: Width of Tree
text: Width of Tree Width of the pane that displays the Tree View in relation to the List View, expressed as a percentage of the total width. Attribute Value Physical Property Name SplitBarPos Property Type range: 1-100 Dynamic? No Default value 33 Description This property is used only when both the Tree View and List View properties are check boxes are selected. It determines the initial position of the split bar by percentage of the widget's total width. The default is 33% of the total width. Use this property to increase or decrease the percentage of the Tree View, or enter a value between 1 and 100. Applies To utree (Tree) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
